ogTitle: Adjungbilly vs Agnes Banks: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Adjungbilly and Agnes Banks.
heading: Adjungbilly vs Agnes Banks — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Adjungbilly, New South Wales and Agnes Banks, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Adjungbilly has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Agnes Banks (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Adjungbilly or Agnes Banks safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Adjungbilly has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Agnes Banks scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Adjungbilly scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Agnes Banks scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Adjungbilly or Agnes Banks?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Adjungbilly has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
